name: gemini-cli
description: Local-first Gemini CLI Memory bridge for Gemini CLI with Obsidian vault transparency.

interface.shortDescription: Local recall and Gemini CLI-owned Obsidian memory
interface.longDescription: Gemini CLI Memory gives Gemini CLI transparent local recall, manual vault-first learning, and readable audit logs through a local MCP server. It talks to the existing Sovereign daemon and keeps expensive extraction out of v1.
defaultPrompt: Recall Gemini CLI Memory for this task
Learn this in the Gemini CLI vault
Show recent Gemini CLI Memory audit logs
